extraction_policy: Whitelist of ArticleV1 code/config/figure-generation dependencies; excludes generated Output, raw data, trained models and large results.
publication_specific_extensions: scripts/01_prepare_windows.py generates canonical provenance directly from pinned raw CSVs, removing a private historical V2 metadata dependency.
trustworthy_agent.article_v1.publication_e2 provides a transparent fallback to a compact routing snapshot when the historical posterior_trace.nc is absent.
scripts/00-06 and scripts/reproduce_all.py provide a clean numbered public interface.
